mnemonics: Elsevier 2018 spells out C-S-P-A for Cloud Security: Confidentiality, Security (tools), Privacy, Accountability
keyPoints: Focuses on security challenges specific to cloud computing environments
Emphasizes a holistic approach combining technology, law, and ethics
Highlights the shared responsibility model between provider and client
commonMistakes: Assuming cloud providers are solely responsible for all security aspects
Overlooking data privacy regulations when selecting a cloud provider's region
Neglecting to encrypt data in transit and at rest, relying solely on provider security
